# Figma

> AI Registry entry [AIR-55](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-55/figma) — status **Sandbox** as of 2026-05-08. Departments: marketing.

**Category:** Design & Collaboration / UI/UX Design Platform
**Cost per User/Month:** $20 Professional; $45 Organisation; $75 Enterprise
**Number of Licences:** 1
**Total Monthly Cost:** $20
**Departments:** Marketing, AI Policy

## Overview

Industry-standard collaborative design platform for UI/UX, prototyping, design systems. Browser-based, real-time collaboration. Used at Janus for presentations, mockups, diagrams, brand assets. Includes Figma AI for intelligent design assistance.

## Capabilities

* Vector design — UI, icons, illustrations, graphics
* Prototyping with transitions, animations
* Auto Layout — responsive components
* Components and design systems with variants
* Figma AI — layout suggestions, asset generation
* FigJam — collaborative whiteboard
* Dev Mode — handoff with code snippets, measurements
* Real-time collaboration

## Security & Compliance

* SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, GDPR
* SSO/SAML on Organisation+
* AES-256 at rest, TLS in transit
* Configurable data residency on Enterprise

## Considerations

* Single licence — may need expansion
* Pro ($20) vs Organisation ($45) — evaluate SSO need
* Figma AI features relatively new
* AI-powered alternatives ([[gamma|Gamma]], [[claude|Claude]] for diagrams) may reduce need

*Sandbox. Functional tier. Single licence for Marketing and AI Policy.*
